name: Resazurin Stock Solution (alamarBlue, 0.1% w/v)

components.name: Resazurin sodium salt
components.note: Sigma R7017 or equivalent; deep blue powder; store at RT dark

notes.en: Dissolve resazurin in warm PBS (37°C) with stirring until fully dissolved (~5 min). Filter-sterilize through 0.22 µm membrane. Solution is deep blue; turns pink/red (resorufin) upon reduction by viable cells. Aliquot 1–5 mL; store at −20°C protected from light (stable 1 year). Working concentration for assay: dilute 1:10 in cell culture medium (0.01% w/v final). Commercial equivalent: alamarBlue Cell Viability Reagent (Thermo), PrestoBlue.
notes.zh: 37°C 温热 PBS 中搅拌溶解（约 5 min）。0.22 µm 过滤除菌。溶液深蓝色；活细胞还原后变为粉红/红色（刃天青）。分装 1–5 mL，−20°C 避光保存（稳定 1 年）。实验使用浓度：10× 稀释加入培养基（终浓度 0.01% w/v）。商品等效：alamarBlue（Thermo）、PrestoBlue。

ref: O'Brien et al. (2000) Eur J Biochem 267:5421–5426; Rampersad (2012) Sensors 12:12347–12360
